name: io.github.cameronrye/activitypub-mcp
description: Security-first, read-only-by-default MCP server for ActivityPub and the Fediverse.

environmentVariables.name: ACTIVITYPUB_ENABLE_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Enable write/mutation tools (post, reply, follow, boost, block). Off by default: read-only unless set to 'true'. See SECURITY.md.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warn, or error.
